note: Inventory covers the user-facing Uniswap V2/V3/V4 router and position-management safety surface on mainnet, Optimism, Arbitrum, and Base. It also covers official UniswapX reactor settlement entrypoints for the current mainnet/Arbitrum/Base chain slice.

contracts.name: Permit2
contracts.reason: user approval and Permit2 signature surface used by Uniswap routes

contracts.name: UniswapX V1 Exclusive Dutch Order Reactor
contracts.reason: official UniswapX mainnet reactor; user-visible settlement entrypoint for signed ExclusiveDutch orders

contracts.name: UniswapX V2 Dutch Order Reactor
contracts.reason: official UniswapX mainnet reactor; user-visible settlement entrypoint for signed V2Dutch orders

contracts.name: UniswapX OrderQuoter
contracts.reason: read-only/developer quoting helper from the official UniswapX deployment list, not a wallet state-changing intent surface

contracts.name: Uniswap V2 Router02
contracts.reason: user-facing Uniswap V2 swap/liquidity router

contracts.name: SwapRouter02
contracts.reason: user-facing Uniswap V3 swap router

contracts.name: Universal Router v1.2
contracts.reason: legacy mainnet user-facing Universal Router v1.2 still present in real wallet traffic

contracts.name: Universal Router v2
contracts.reason: user-facing Uniswap universal router

contracts.name: Universal Router 2.1.1
contracts.reason: latest user-facing Uniswap universal router

contracts.name: NonfungiblePositionManager
contracts.reason: user-facing Uniswap V3 position NFT manager

contracts.name: V4 PositionManager
contracts.reason: user-facing Uniswap V4 position NFT manager

contracts.name: V4 PoolManager
contracts.reason: canonical V4 PoolManager; direct initialize calls are observable wallet transactions
